title: dryopteris scabra var. bifrons
intro: Dryopteris scabra var. bifrons, also known as the rough buckler fern, is a variety of the rough buckler fern plant, a type of fern that belongs to the Dryopteris genus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Dryopteris scabra var. bifrons include the potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antiviral agent. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
